what_it_does: NPM lockfile (lockfileVersion 3) that pins exact dependency versions, integrity hashes, resolved registry URLs, transitive dependencies, optional native platform packages, and package metadata for the recollection project.
observations: Project recollection v1.4.2, MIT licensed, with hasInstallScript set to true.
Direct dependencies include @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk, @huggingface/transformers, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk, better-sqlite3, marked, proper-lockfile, sqlite-vec, and zod.
Four CLI binaries are declared: recollection, recollection-index, recollection-mcp-server, and recollection-search.
Multiple esbuild versions are co-installed: 0.25.12 at top level, 0.28.1 under tsx, and 0.27.7 under vite.
The MCP SDK transitively pulls in Express 5.2.1, Hono, CORS, express-rate-limit, jose, and related packages.
Many native/optional platform-specific packages are recorded for esbuild, sharp, sqlite-vec, onnxruntime-node, rollup, and fsevents.
Packages with install scripts include better-sqlite3, esbuild, sharp, onnxruntime-node, protobufjs, and fsevents.
Deprecated transitive packages appear, such as boolean and prebuild-install.
Development tooling includes TypeScript 5.9.3, tsx, esbuild, and vitest 3.2.6.
License mix spans MIT, Apache-2.0, BSD, ISC, LGPL-3.0-or-later, and others.
standouts: Heavy native dependency surface spanning SQLite, vector search, ONNX runtime, and image processing.
Three distinct esbuild versions locked simultaneously.
Combination of Claude Agent SDK, MCP SDK, and Hugging Face Transformers points to a local AI/LLM memory system.
CLI names reveal episodic memory, conversation indexing, search, and MCP server roles.
conventions: Follows npm lockfileVersion 3 schema with packages keyed by node_modules/<name> and nested paths for transitive duplicates.
Uses caret ranges in package.json but pins exact versions, integrity hashes, and resolved URLs in the lockfile.
Records optionalDependencies with os/cpu constraints for native packages.
Separates dev and non-dev dependencies via the dev flag.
concerns: Deprecated transitive dependencies (boolean, prebuild-install) are still present.
Multiple esbuild versions increase install size and potential version-conflict surface.
Several packages require install scripts, raising native build and supply-chain risk.
The MCP SDK brings a large transitive web-server surface (Express, Hono, etc.) into a CLI tool.
No packageManager field or lockfile generation timestamp is present.
notes: This lockfile documents a Node.js CLI project with a broad AI-native runtime footprint and multiple platform-specific binary dependencies.
questions: What Node.js engine version is required or enforced by the project itself?
How do the four CLI entry points share code and data stores?
How are unsupported native optional dependencies handled at install time?
Have the install scripts and native prebuilds been audited for supply-chain safety?
purpose_vs_actual: The file's stated purpose is to reproducibly pin dependency versions; it does that and additionally reveals a large transitive native/AI/CLI dependency surface.
intention_signals: The project appears to be a locally runnable memory, indexing, and search utility for LLM conversations, distributed as multiple CLI commands and exposed via MCP, relying on SQLite with vector search, local embedding/inference, and Anthropic agent integration.
novelty: The combination of Claude Agent SDK, MCP SDK, Hugging Face Transformers, sqlite-vec, and multiple custom CLI binaries in one small project is distinctive.
contribution: Provides a fully resolved, reproducible dependency graph with integrity checks and platform-specific native package selections that a fused system can use to reconstruct the runtime environment and audit the supply chain.
summary_for_embedding: This is the npm package lockfile for the recollection project, pinning exact versions and transitive dependencies for a Node.js CLI tool that combines SQLite vector storage, LLM agent SDKs, and MCP server capabilities.
intention_for_embedding: It was generated to make dependency installation reproducible and to record the resolved native-platform packages required by the recollection memory/indexing/search CLI.
